CustomField.description: This field indicates the next expected due date for receiving the Utilization Report from the operator. The due date is automatically calculated based on the latest approved utilization date from the linked Asset. It is derived by identifying the end of the month following the last utilization date, then adding the number of days specified in the 'Utilization Reporting Due Day' field. For eg, if the last utilization date is January 31st and the due day is set to 10, the due date will be March 10th.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field indicates the next expected due date for receiving the Utilization Report from the operator. The due date is automatically calculated based on the latest approved utilization date from the linked Asset. It is derived by identifying the end of the month following the last utilization date, then adding the number of days specified in the 'Utilization Reporting Due Day' field. For eg, if the last utilization date is January 31st and the due day is set to 10, the due date will be March 10th.
CustomField.label: Utilization_Reporting_Due_Date
